ddls:
CREATE TABLE "soil_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil sample */,
  "sample_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the sample for identification */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the soil sample was collected */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sample was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sample collection site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sample collection site */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Moisture content of the soil at the time of collection */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature at the time of collection */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the soil at the time of collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metal_concentrations" (
  "concentration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concentration record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil sample */,
  "cu" REAL /* Copper concentration in the sample */,
  "mn" REAL /* Manganese concentration in the sample */,
  "pb" REAL /* Lead concentration in the sample */,
  "cd" REAL /* Cadmium concentration in the sample */,
  "zn" REAL /* Zinc concentration in the sample */,
  "ni" REAL /* Nickel concentration in the sample */,
  "fe" REAL /* Iron concentration in the sample */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the metal concentrations were analyzed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concentration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metal_concentrations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Type of land use at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contamination_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold record */,
  "metal_name" TEXT /* Name of the metal (e.g., Cu, Pb) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Safe threshold value for the metal concentration */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the threshold value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related soil sample */,
  "message" TEXT /* Alert message regarding contamination levels */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Email or phone number the notification was sent to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding soil sample */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil from which the sample was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for sample collection */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the time of collection */,
  "soil_texture" TEXT /* Soil texture at the collection site */,
  "vegetation_cover" TEXT /* Type and density of vegetation at the collection site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_metadata_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)
